settings.description: Adjust the width of the note when Readable Line Length is turned on.

settings.title: Full Focus
settings.description: Completely remove tabs and the sidebar, and hide the note titlebar until hover. The note takes up the entire screen. I recommend setting hotkeys for the sidebars before enabling this option.

settings.title: Floating Document
settings.description: Give the note a floating document appearance, like Google Docs or Microsoft Word. Recommeded for use with a low readable line length.

settings.title: Use Custom Background Color
settings.description: Use a custom background color when Floating Document is enabled.

settings.title: Floating Document Background
settings.description: Choose the background color that is used when Floating Document is turned on. Requires the setting above to be toggled ON. NOTE - will be overriden if a background image is set.

settings.title: Hide Frontmatter
settings.description: Make frontmatter invisible in reading mode.

settings.title: Turn off box shadows
settings.description: Turn off box shadows for certain elements (does not apply to the "paper shadow" setting).

settings.title: Unhide Ribbon
settings.description: Show the left ribbon, which is hidden by default.

settings.title: Remove File Icons
settings.description: Remove the note icons in the file explorer.

settings.title: Remove Special File Icons
settings.description: Force all notes to use the default note icon rather than prefixing special icons based on the file path.

settings.title: Remove Folder Icons
settings.description: Remove the folder icons in the file explorer.

settings.title: Remove Vault Icon
settings.description: Remove the vault icon in the file explorer.

settings.title: Level 1 Emoji
settings.description: This is the emoji that will be displayed on a level 1 folder. You must wrap the emoji in quotes, like this: '⭐'

settings.title: Level 1 Emoji - Open
settings.description: This is the emoji that will be displayed on a level 1 folder when it is open.

settings.title: Heading Font
settings.description: This font effects headings, links, and highlighted text.

settings.title: Left-Align Level 1 Headings
settings.description: By default, level 1 headings are centered. Toggle this setting to make them left-aligned.

settings.description: This font is used for much of the interface and makes up most of a notes body.

settings.title: Emoji Style
settings.description: Choose how emojis will appear in the body of a note.

settings.title: Line Height
settings.description: Control the line spacing in the body of a note.

settings.title: Code Block Line Height
settings.description: Control the line height of code blocks

settings.title: Adjust Image Size
settings.description: Limit the width of images to 700px. Works best with wide line lengths.

settings.title: ℹ️ Icons
settings.description: Customize note title icons created using the `icon` css class.

settings.title: Icon Shadow
settings.description: NOTE - will be overriden by the Turn Off Shadows option under the Workspace heading.

settings.title: Full-Screen Modals

settings.title: Tile Radius
settings.description: Adjust the border radius for page gallery tiles.

settings.title: Image Radius
settings.description: Adjust the border radius for page gallery images only. By default, this is the same as the tile radius, but you can override it with something like "16px" or "10px 10px 0px 0px".

settings.title: Padding
settings.description: Change the padding inside page gallery tiles.

settings.title: Field Padding
settings.description: Change the padding around page gallery fields only.

settings.title: Flexgrow for Tiles
settings.description: When turned on, tile widths will increase to fill empty gaps.

settings.title: Intro to basic image position
settings.description: You can add 🔸|Left (can also use `left`, `LEFT` or `L` to replace the `Left` before), 🔸|Right (right/RIGHT/R) and 🔸|Inline (inline/INLINE/inl/INL/Inl) 🔸|Centre/Center (CENTRE/CENTER/centre/center/C) (the “centre” one is for the “Obsidian Default Image Position above only, because Topaz's default image position is in the centre) into a image format to adjust the image position, e.g. ![[*.jpg|L]], ![[*.png|Right|200]] and ![|inl](...*.jpg)
settings.description.zh: 在图片格式里添加 🔸|Left (can also use `left`, `LEFT` or `L` to replace the `Left` before), 🔸|Right (right/RIGHT/R) and 🔸|Inline (inline/INLINE/inl/INL/Inl) 🔸|Centre/Center (CENTRE/CENTER/centre/center/C) (这个选项只在开启 “Obsidian默认图片位置” 后生效，因为Topaz默认图片位置就是居中) 来改变图片位置, e.g. ![[*.jpg|L]], ![[*.png|Right|200]] and ![|inl](...*.jpg)

settings.title: Intro to image caption
settings.description: You can add 🔸#Left|your captions (can also use `left`, `LEFT` or `L` to replace the `Left`), 🔸#Right (or right/RIGHT/R)|your captions, 🔸#center/centre (CENTRE/CENTER/Center/Centre/C) |your captions and 🔸#inl (Inline/INLINE/inline/INL/Inl) |your captions into a image format to adjust the image position with a image caption, e.g. ![[*.jpg#left|Figure 1]], ![[*.png#right|Figure 2|200]], ![[*.jpg#centre|Figure 3]] and ![[*.jpg#inl|Figure 4|100]]
settings.description.zh: 在图片格式里添加 🔸#left (can also use `left`, `LEFT` or `L` to replace the `Left`) |your captions, 🔸#right (or right/RIGHT/R) |your captions, 🔸#center/centre (CENTRE/CENTER/Center/Centre/C) |your captions and 🔸#inl (Inline/INLINE/inline/INL/Inl) |your captions 来改变图片位置，并添加图片标题, e.g. ![[*.jpg#left|Figure 1]], ![[*.png#right|Figure 2|200]], ![[*.jpg#C|Figure 3]] and ![[*.jpg#inl|Figure 4|100]]

settings.title: Intro to image grid
settings.description: You can add 🔸|+grid into some images to grid these images in a line, e.g. ![[*.jpg|+grid]] Or type ❗cssclass：img-grid❗ in YAML to make images arrange in a grid in the preview mode. require Contextual Typography plugin
settings.description.zh: 在图片格式里添加 🔸|+grid 使复数的图片排成一行, e.g. ![[*.jpg|+grid]] 。或者在YAML种输入 ❗cssclass：img-grid❗最好安装 Contextual Typography 插件实现更好的并排效果

settings.title: Glow Daily Notes and General Notes
Headers and special text For Daily Notes
Restore Default Ribbon
settings.description: Replace the floating sidebar button with the default Obsidian ribbon on desktop.

🎨 Appearance presets: [get presets here](https://github.com/Akifyss/obsidian-border/blob/main/presets.md), click on “Import” in the top right corner and restart obsidian.

📭 If you have problems, please submit [issues](https://github.com/Akifyss/obsidian-border/issues) or [discuss](https://github.com/Akifyss/obsidian-border/discussions) on Github

🔼 View recent updates: [Github Commit History](https://github.com/Akifyss/obsidian-border/commits/main)
settings.description.zh:
🎨 外观预设：[在此获取预设](https://github.com/Akifyss/obsidian-border/blob/main/presets.md)，点击右上角“Import”导入预设，重启obsidian来生效.

📭 如果遇到问题，可以在Github上 [提交issues](https://github.com/Akifyss/obsidian-border/issues) 或[讨论](https://github.com/Akifyss/obsidian-border/discussions)

🔼 查看最近更新：[Github Commit History](https://github.com/Akifyss/obsidian-border/commits/main)

settings.title: Banner Content Offset
settings.description: Controls how far down the cards start. Lower value = Higher up (More overlap with banner).

settings.title: Card Transparency
settings.description: Adjusts how see-through the cards are. Higher % = More transparent.
The values in quick change's default use the default Bubble and Space variables, but can still be used alongside Color and Style Presets. You can check out the presets' values [here]()

settings.title: Remove borders around PDF pages
settings.description: View PDFs without borders, akin to the Minimal theme's "seamless" setting

settings.title: Darken PDF background
settings.description: When using a dark flavor, inverts a PDF's background color. This might be helpful when using a PDF with a light background in dark mode Obsidian, depending on your preferences and the colors present in the PDF

settings.title: Blend PDF background
settings.description: When using light mode, attempts to blend the theme's background color into the PDF

settings.title: Pill-shaped tags
settings.description: Make tags stand out with a pill-shaped appearance, reverts to Obsidian's default style

settings.title: Cards Sidebar Layout
settings.description: Toggle a cards layout for sidebars. NOTE - will not have any effect if Classic Layout is turned on.

settings.title: Classic Layout
settings.description: Get rid of rounded note corners for a more blocky, classic look. NOTE - will override Cards Layout.

settings.title: Line Style
settings.description: Line style displayed on borders.

settings.title: Border Radius (Roundness)
settings.description: Adjust the roundness of the panes and other small elements (overriden with classic mode turned on)

settings.title: Readable Line Length
settings.description: Change the width of the note when Readable Line Length is turned on.

settings.title: Folder Colors
settings.description: Enable or disable rainbow folders (original rainbow folders created by Lithou)

settings.title: Active Tab Color
settings.description: Change the text color of the active tab.

settings.title: Enable Workspace Background Image
settings.description: Set a background image for your workspace.

settings.title: Background Blur
settings.description: Apply a blurring effect to the background image. I recommend using higher values for dark mode.

settings.title: Smaller Headings
settings.description: Make headings smaller and less distracting.

settings.title: Underlined Highlights
settings.description: Show highlights as underlined text.

settings.title: Increased Line Height
settings.description: Increase line height and paragraph spacing for more readability.

settings.title: Custom font
settings.description: This will override theme fonts, but it will not override any font defined in Settings/Appearance.

settings.title: Responsive Tile Height
settings.description: Make text break and continue on the next line rather than overflowing. Tile heights will change to accommodate the whole text.

settings.title: Loose Tiles
settings.description: Make the tiles resize and rearrange themselves depending on the size of their content. This gets rid of the rigid columnar layout.

settings.title: Focus Mode
settings.description: Hide certain UI elements until you hover over them with your mouse.

settings.title: Enable Ultra Focus (A.K.A. Full-Screen)
settings.description: Everything except your note is completely invisible until you hover over it. Your note takes up most of the screen.

settings.title: Background-to-text contrast
settings.description: The background lightness and saturation will be adjusted by this amount to give more contast to the text.

settings.title: Readable line length
settings.description: The maximum line length when "Readable line length" is enabled.
**Readable line length** can be enabled under **Settings → Editor → Readable line length**.

settings.title: Dark Clarity Theme
settings.description:
> 一款 obsidian 的主题 

  > 主要以 **高辨识度**、且 h1~h6 标题 **有主题色** 为主 

 > 参考 Dark Moss Theme 部分作为基底，并且进行了多处优化： 

 > - 多款配色选择 
 > - 浅色模式时的配色 
 > - 优化辨识度（粗体明显、图片边框、引用块去斜体）
  > - 更多可选的优化功能（左边栏横向滚动、左边栏文件夹配色）

settings.description: The size of list item indents. The default value set here of 28px mimics the appearance of editing mode. If you want a more default experience, the default theme uses 2.25em which is essentially 36px. Currently does not work as intended due to JS changes in Obsidian 1.5 which is sad... There are technically workarounds but they would not be very clean.

settings.title: About
settings.description:
Flexcyon is a theme based around the Halcyon, Flexoki and Origami themes. You can find its [source code here](https://github.com/bladeacer/flexcyon).

It aims to be *reasonably opinionated and highly customisable*. If you are interested, feel free to learn more about the theme via the ==README and the documentation==. When it comes to customising this theme, installing and using the Settings Search plugin is highly recommended.

settings.title: Documentation
settings.description:
For more information, check out the [documentation here](https://flexcyon.github.io/docs-en/).

如果您更熟悉中文, 请 [单击此处](https://flexcyon.github.io/docs-en/zh/) 查看中文文档。

For your own sanity when it comes to searching for settings, the Settings Search plugin is highly recommended.

A caveat of Style Settings is that it sometimes does not properly unload CSS classes. Hence, you would need to reload or restart your app for certain customisations to take effect. I am working to improve this.

Settings you would need to do this for include the status bar, workspace layouts, animations (and a few others)

settings.title: Modes
settings.description: Some unique modes flexcyon has to offer. You are also able to configure accessibility settings here.

settings.title: Return to Zero mode
settings.description: Extreme minimalism inspired by Shimmering Focus theme. Will override some Style Settings options. Will not work with Flex Max mode enabled.

settings.title: Flex Max mode
settings.description: An extremely opinionated set up which showcases the unique customisation in this theme, with features working out of the box. If some options are not too your taste you can disable this mode and customise the theme more yourself, it will reset the theme to a clean slate customisations wise. There are also other default options enabled which you may or may not like. Refer to the documentation for the list of options it enables on your behalf.

settings.description: The Kakano theme uses a base color for each vault, and generates different shades and gradients from it. You can either select from one of the preset colors, or specify an exact color.

settings.title: Preset base color
settings.description: If you just want a quick color, choose one of these.

settings.title: Exact base color
settings.description: Set an exact base color. Make sure "Preset base color" is empty, and click Save to apply.

settings.title: Light mode note background
settings.description: In light mode, note backgrounds can be full white (default) or near white with a slight tint of the base color.

settings.title: Dark mode note background
settings.description: In dark mode, note backgrounds can be near black (default) or full black. Near black is a bit easier on the eyes. Full black will save a little energy on OLED screens which will switch back pixels completely off. And some people just like the way it looks.

options.label: Full black (OLED screen will switch pixels off)

settings.title: Distinguish non-editable tabs
settings.description: Most tabs have content created by you (e.g. notes, canvases, kanban charts) but some aren't directly editable (e.g. graphs, calendars, maps). When this setting is on, the non-editable tabs are shaded differently when inactive.

settings.title: Wrap Tabs
settings.description: EXPERIMENTAL If there are more tabs than fit in a single row, allow them to wrap to multiple rows.

settings.title: Properties position
settings.description: Place properties before or after your main note content. Note that this only applies to Live Preview mode.

settings.title: Embedded note titles
settings.description: When a note is embedded in another note, show or hide the source note's title.

settings.title: Embedded links scroll position
settings.description: EXPERIMENTAL Embedded links can be placed at the below your content (so you scroll to the bottom to see them), or pinned so they stay visible as you scroll.

options.label: Place below content (scroll down to view)

settings.title: Style nested bullet levels differently
settings.description: Show different bullets for different levels of nesting

settings.title: Heading font
settings.description: Font used for headings. Leave empty to use the same font as body text, as defined by `Text font` in `Appearance`.

settings.title: Heading scale factor – desktop/tablet
settings.description: Scale factor for heading sizes. Larger numbers will increase the difference between different heading sizes, smaller numbers will decrease the difference.

settings.title: Heading scale factor – phone
settings.description: Scale factor for heading sizes on smaller phone screens. With space at a premium, you'll usually want this to be smaller than the desktop scale factor

Maximum line length in characters. 50-75 characters is often recommended for readability in languages with Latin scripts. 15-35 characters may be better for Chinese, Japanese and Korean characters.

These settings apply when the **Readable line length** setting is enabled in **Editor**

settings.title: Line length for Live Preview and Source Mode

settings.description: These settings apply to the **Live Preview** and **Source** modes, but not to the **Reading** mode.

settings.title: Highlight active line
settings.description: Show a background color behind the active line while editing.

settings.title: Line numbers in code blocks
settings.description: Show line numbers in code blocks

settings.title: Center images
settings.description: Center images horizontally
Images can also be centered individually e.g. `![[image_file_name.jpg|center]]`

settings.title: Wide tables
settings.description: Allow wide tables to extend left and right beyond the margins for body text.

settings.title: Background gradient contrast
settings.description: Degree of contrast for background gradients. Set to zero for a flat background color.

settings.title: Use a custom gradient for the background
settings.description: Kakano normally provides a smooth gradient background using the same hue as the base color. This setting overrides that so you can have a gradient with different hues top and bottom. Note that the colors you set here won't be used directly: they'll be lightened for light mode and darkened for dark mode.

settings.title: Custom Gradient Top
settings.description: Base color for the top of the gradient

settings.title: Custom Gradient Bottom
settings.description: Base color for the bottom of the gradient

settings.title: Full width status bar
settings.description: EXPERIMENTAL If you have many items in your status bar, you may find that it overflows onto the sidebars. This setting will push the main app workspace up so the status bar can use the full window width.

settings.title: Enable icons in Settings
settings.description: Obsidian normally shows icons beside settings groups. If you find that distracting, this setting allows you to hide them.

settings.title: Enable icons in non-native Menus
settings.description: Obsidian normally shows icons for menu items. This setting does not apply if Native Menus are enabled.

settings.title: Mobile horizontal spacing
settings.description: Width of space to the left and right of the note content. Set to zero if you'd like the note to extend to the full width, 0.5 or 1 if you'd like to see your background gradient.

settings.title: Mobile cards UI
settings.description: EXPERIMENTAL Scale the main workspace down when there's a modal in the foreground, creating a 3D cards effect. Currently unfinished, but you can see it when you open a prompt.

settings.title: Enable built-in alternative checkboxes
settings.description: Kakano provides styles for some common alternative checkbox states. Different themes have built-in support for different sets of alternative checkboxes, so some users may prefer to use their own CSS snippets that work across multiple themes. If you'd like to do this, you can disable Kakano's built-in alternative checkboxes to ensure that they don't clas with the snippet.
> [!info] > The [Alternative Checkboxes Reference Set project](https://github.com/damiankorcz/Alternative-Checkboxes-Reference-Set) is working on standardising alternative checkboxes.

settings.title: Enable image adjustment with alt text
settings.description: With this setting enabled, Kakano recognises keywords in alt text to position images left/right/center and round corners. None of these are crucial functionality, so if you need to use alt text for its real purpose of accessibility, you can disable this setting.
By default, Kakano changes the appearance of many community plugins to provide a more consistent appearance. If you prefer the standard appearance for a plugin you can disable Kakano's changes.

settings.title: Move top buttons
settings.description: Note: Only in case the top buttons cover the phone status bar

settings.title: Table Style
settings.description: Ignore DataView table. Minimal: Academic style with only horizontal lines; Colorful: Accented header and line background colors
settings.description.zh: 忽略 DataView 表格。Minimal: 仅显示横线的学术风格；Colorful: 加深表头和行的背景色

settings.description.zh: 鼠标悬停时显示；别名为 “#” 时禁用，例如：![[文件名|#]]

settings.title.zh: 阅读视图中引言的样式

settings.description.zh: ❗精力有限，暂不适配 Callout 中的列表或待办项

settings.title.zh: Logseq Bullet Thread 样式的列表

settings.title.zh: 已完成的事项使用灰色文字

settings.description.zh: 如果您正在使用自己的 CSS 片段实现，请禁用此选项

settings.title: Enable Code Block Line Numbers in Live Preview Mode
settings.title.zh: 在实时预览模式下启用代码块行号
settings.description: Due to the limitation of Obsidian's render strategy, if the code block has too many lines, line numbering may be incorrect
settings.description.zh: 由于 Obsidian 渲染方式的限制，如果代码块行数过多，行号可能会出现错误

settings.title: Enable Code Block Language Indicator in Reading View
settings.title.zh: 在阅读视图下启用代码块语言标识

settings.title: Prevent Code Wrapping in Reading View
settings.title.zh: 阅读视图下代码过长时不换行

settings.description.zh: 仅在编辑器内生效

settings.title: Enable Code Block Background in Reading View
settings.title.zh: 在阅读视图下启用代码块背景

settings.title.zh: 自定义阅读视图下代码块背景

settings.description.zh: 无代码块边框；导出 PDF 时不生效

settings.title: Use Theme's Color Scheme
settings.title.zh: 使用主题的代码高亮方案

settings.title.zh: 在实时预览模式下点击标签进行编辑

settings.description.zh: 点击 “#” 跳转

settings.title: Tag Style
settings.description: Tags like "#obsidian", "#todo", "#important", "#progress", and "#complete" will be colorized when using "Outline" or "Fill" styles
settings.description.zh: 当选择 “Outline” 或 “Fill” 样式时，“#obsidian”、“#todo”、“#important”、“#progress”、“#complete” 标签会有额外颜色

settings.title: Hide Left Canvas Control Buttons
settings.description: Shows on hover
settings.description.zh: 鼠标移入时显示

settings.title: Set Background to Transparent
settings.title.zh: 导出时将页面背景色设置为透明

settings.title: Better Page Break Strategy

settings.description.zh: 在 H1 标题前强制分页；避免在图片、表格和代码块内分页

settings.title: Standard Spacing Between Paragraphs and List
settings.title.zh: 标准的段落和列表的间距

settings.title: Use Default Style for Horizontal Rule
settings.title.zh: 使用默认的水平线样式

settings.title: Hide Property Panel in Reading View
settings.title.zh: 阅读视图下隐藏属性面板

settings.description:
If you find any plugin not displaying properly, please open an issue at the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/subframe7536/obsidian-theme-maple).
> [!info]- Adapted plugins
> - Better Command Palette
> - Calendar
> - Obsidian Git
> - MySnippets
> - Quite Outline
> - Recent Files
> - Settings Search
> - Shiki Highlighter
settings.description.zh:
如果您发现某个插件显示不正常，请前往 [GitHub 仓库](https://github.com/subframe7536/obsidian-theme-maple) 提交 issue。
> [!info]- 已适配的插件
> - Better Command Palette
> - Calendar
> - Obsidian Git
> - MySnippets
> - Quite Outline
> - Recent Files
> - Settings Search
> - Shiki Highlighter

settings.title: Calendar Maximum Width
settings.description: Any CSS "max-width" value
settings.description.zh: 任何 CSS “max-width” 值

settings.title: Enable Floating Mode Switch Button
settings.title.zh: 启用浮动的模式切换按钮

settings.title: Font Settings
settings.description: It is inconvenient to install fonts on mobile devices, so maybe you need this option
settings.description.zh: 移动端不方便安装字体，所以有了这个选项

settings.description:
> [!tip]
> 1. Reset options in **Appearance > Font** to make this work
> 2. Type "**maplemono**" if you want to use the theme's built-in monospace font Maple Mono
> 3. External font can load from CSS Snippets.
settings.description.zh:
> [!tip]
> 1. 需要先重置 **外观 > 字体** 中的选项才能生效
> 2. 如果想使用主题内置的等宽字体 Maple Mono，请输入 **maplemono**
> 3. 外部字体可以通过 CSS 片段加载

settings.title: Interface Font
settings.description: Any CSS "font-family" value
settings.description.zh: 任何 CSS “font-family” 值

settings.title: Text Font
settings.description: Any CSS "font-family" value
settings.description.zh: 任何 CSS “font-family” 值

settings.title: Monospace Font
settings.description: Any CSS "font-family" value
settings.description.zh: 任何 CSS “font-family” 值

settings.title: Hide left toolbar with left panel (Desktop)
settings.description: Hides the left toolbar ("ribbon") when the left panel is closed. (Windows & Linux Only)

settings.title: Drag window more easily (Desktop)
settings.description: Allows you to drag the window by the tab title bar (if enabled) as well as the left sidebar (ribbon). Recommended to leave on unless you have issues.

settings.title: Drag window with active tab (Desktop)
settings.description: When on, dragging an active tab will drag the entire window, instead of the tab itself.

settings.title: Pen Mode (for Excalidraw)
settings.description: Currently only applies to Excalidraw plugin in tray mode. Moves the toolbar to the left for easier access, and hides the welcome splash.

settings.title: Increase Accent Color Vibrancy
settings.description: Lets the fully saturated accent through on certain elements. May cause readability problems, depending on chosen accent color.

settings.title: Dim Light Mode
settings.description: Uses a slightly tinted grey in light mode, instead of pure white, for backgrounds.

settings.title: Add scroll space above document
settings.description: Adds some space above documents, so you can scroll them a little further down. Similar to Dropbox Paper.

settings.title: Disable tooltip animation
settings.description: Disables the "pop-out" animation on tooltips.

settings.title: Enable transparency support (Desktop)
settings.description: Make parts of the main window translucent. Use instead of built-in transparency option. Both mac and windows require native frame to be set to system for this to work. Windows additionally requires Mica for Everyone, with the following settings for obsidian - Titlebar Color System, Backdrop Type Mica, Extend Frame into Client Area On

settings.title: Native Windows Right-Click Menus (Desktop)
settings.description: Makes right-click menus on Windows look like Windows 11 native menus.

settings.title: Remove top padding (Desktop)
settings.description: Removes the bit of space above the tabs.

settings.title: Hide sidebar header (Mobile)
settings.description: Hides the header that appears at the top of the left sidebar on mobile. This will remove the buttons for opening settings and switching vaults, so you'll have to do those using the command palette.

settings.title: Button shapes (Mobile)
settings.description: Displays many buttons on mobile as 'chips' with a distinct background. Turn off for a more minimal style and tighter spacing.

settings.title: Preview Font
settings.description: Used in preview mode
settings.default: Roboto, "Inter", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Microsoft YaHei Light", sans-serif;

settings.title: Editor Font
settings.description: Used in editor mode
settings.default: Roboto,"Inter",-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif,"Apple Color Emoji","Segoe UI Emoji","Segoe UI Symbol","Microsoft YaHei Light",sans-serif;

settings.title: Monospace Font
settings.description: Used in code

settings.title: Enable FAB (Mobile)
settings.description: Displays a floating button in the bottom right, on phones. Tab title bar must be on!

settings.title: Enable FAB (Desktop)
settings.description: Displays a floating button in the bottom right, on computers. Tab title bar must be on! (May not be visible in horizontally split views)

settings.title: Hide tab-status-bar buttons on mobile
settings.description: Hides buttons in the optional tab status bar, excluding the one used for the FAB. (Useful with Commander plugin)

settings.title: Customizable FAB action
settings.description: Uses the first button in the optional tab status bar for the FAB. Set an item of your choice to appear first using the Commander plugin to customize the FAB action.

settings.title: Background Opacity
settings.description: The opacity of the background mask (black in dark mode, white in light mode).

settings.title: Minimal Image Captions
settings.description: Use a minimal image caption style (preview mode).

settings.title: Show Header Levels
settings.description: Show header levels instead of collapse indicators in the editor (preview mode).

settings.title: Show Header Hashtags
settings.description: Show hashtags before headers in the editor (preview mode).

settings.title: Hide Header Link Underline
settings.description: Hide the underline on header links in the editor (preview mode).

settings.title: Hide Tab Bar
settings.description: Hide the tab bar dynamically, always, or never.

settings.title: Hide File Explorer Navigation Header
settings.description: Hide the file explorer navigation header dynamically, always, or never.

settings.title: Hide Sidebar Buttons
settings.description: Hide the buttons for toggling left/right sidebars.

settings.title: De-emphasize Status Bar
settings.description: De-emphasize the status bar (preview mode).

settings.title: De-emphasize File Properties
settings.description: De-emphasize file properties in the editor (preview mode).

settings.title: De-emphasize Embedded Backlinks
settings.description: De-emphasize embedded backlinks in the editor (preview mode).

settings.title: Settings Hover Preview
settings.description: With this on, you can preview your Obsidian appearance by simply putting the cursor outside of the settings window.

settings.title: Color Palette
settings.description: Colors in window. If you add another theme before this, it will be used in "inherit", or just the usual Obsidian colors.

settings.title: Disable Bevels
settings.description: Disable bevels, resulting in a more minimalist appearance.

settings.title: Enable XP-style Icons
settings.description: Enable colorful XP-style icons to replace flat SVG icons. This is only done where the icons are supported. (Not supported with dtm08)

settings.title: Blender Style Dropdowns
settings.description: Enable Blender 2.7esque dropdowns.

settings.title: Windows 7 Title Bar
settings.description: Enable Windows 7 Title Bar and Frame.

settings.title: Color Intensity Multiplier (Accent Only)
settings.description: Determine Micro Mike Palette color brightness.

settings.title: Bevel Color Intensity Multiplier (Accent Only)
settings.description: Determine Micro Mike Palette color brightness for bevel.

settings.title: Link Brightness Intensity Multiplier (Accent Only)
settings.description: Determine Micro Mike Palette additive brightness for link.

settings.title: Shared UI Components (Scrollbar, Drag bars, Resize bars, Ribbon...)
Resize Bars Size
settings.description: The size of the resize bars for each of the sidebars.

settings.title: Scroll Bar Size
settings.description: The width of the scrollbar on the side.

settings.title: Ribbon Width
settings.description: The width of the space occupied by the ribbon.

settings.title: Ribbon Button Height
settings.description: The height of the ribbon buttons.

settings.title: Disable Sidebar Fast Close
settings.description: Micro Mike uses a hack to make sidebars disappear immediately upon pressing the button. This disables that.

settings.title: Extend Right Sidebar Minimum Width
settings.description: With the right sidebar button now on the task bar, Micro Mike makes the right sidebar longer to compensate - if you want.

settings.title: Text Window Length
settings.description: Size of text window in text editor.

settings.title: Center Align Readable Line Length
settings.description: Undo modified left-aligned readable line length to normal standard.

settings.title: Disable Properties Display in Preview / Live Preview (Still avail. in Source Mode)
Disable Toplinks
settings.description: By default, Micro Mike modifies the Backlinks plugin's optional footer display to display at the top a simple set of links leading to your current document.

settings.title: Disable Simple Editor
settings.description: This switch disables the line-height focused modifications to the editor.

settings.title: Line Height Multiplier
settings.description: Line height for simple editor.

settings.title: Disable Simple Editor Code Block
settings.description: This switch disables the modified, line-height aligned codeblocks.

settings.title: Disable Simple Editor Callout
settings.description: This switch disables the modified, line-height aligned callout.

settings.title: Re-Enable Dynamic Unloading in Text Preview
Stack the tabs
settings.description: The tabs will be stacked.

settings.title: Stack Tabs Width
settings.description: The width of the stacked tabs.

settings.title: Disable Tab X Buttons
settings.description: Did you know you can close tabs by middle clicking on them?

settings.title: Tab Title Word Wrap

settings.title: Right Sidebar Button Alignment
settings.description: This determines the alignment of the sidebar button. **titlebarAlign**: Acts as a fourth button on the titlebar. **outsideSidebar**: Creates a button on the outside of the sidebar to the right - this is the default behavior. **insideSidebar**: Creates a button inside the sidebar to the left.

settings.title: Disable Titlebar Spacing

settings.title: Fonts and Accents
settings.description: Looking to customize your font choices or accent color? Go to `Appearance` in the main menu.
📚 Visit the [Full Guide](https://primary-theme.github.io/) for the complete documentation including theme features, font guides, customization guide and more
🎯 Check out the [Roadmap](https://git.new/primary/project-tracker) to get a view of Primary's Development
📮 Subscribe to [Primary Theme Updates](https://primarytheme.substack.com/subscribe) to get notified of Primary updates, new features, and goodies right in your inbox!
⚙️ To change fonts, go to Settings → Appearance → Font, and select the font you want to use (must be installed in your system).
🌿 Primary v1.0 user? Want to use the original Karla font? Read the [Karla Font Guide](https://primary-theme.github.io/guides/font-recommendations/karla/) to learn how to get back into using it.
🌸 Visit the [Font Recommendation Guide](https://primary-theme.github.io/guides/font-recommendations/overview/) for more curated font options for Primary! The guide includes a setup tutorial.

Some fonts offer stylistic alternates to glyphs of their fonts. This can be activated via a CSS property called font feature settings. `1` means "feature is turned on", and `0` means "feature is turned off".

This setting is quite technical so if you aren't sure how to use it please refer to the [MDN guide on font-feature-settings](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/font-feature-settings).

Not all fonts offer the same stylistic alternates so it's best to check out your font's respective manuals or specifications.

This section targets interface font sizes, meaning text that is not in the markdown editor. To change the size of the editor text, please use Obsidian's built-in setting. You can find this under Settings → Appearance → Font Size.

settings.title: Smallest UI Font Size
settings.description: Acceptable font size unit is only in px.

settings.title: Smaller UI Font Size
settings.description: Acceptable font size unit is only in px.

settings.title: Small UI Font Size
settings.description: Acceptable font size unit is only in px.

settings.title: Medium UI Font Size
settings.description: Acceptable font size unit is only in px.

settings.title: Large UI Font Size
settings.description: Acceptable font size unit is only in px.

☝️ By default with Inter, the font is a little bit thin. To increase readability, I increased the base font weight for each category by 50. If you decide to use your own font, the options below are good to use if you find the font you're using a bit too thick. You can bring them back down by 50 to use the original defaults weights.

settings.title: Bold Modifier
settings.description: This is an addend to Normal Font Weight for certain interface components that Obsidian wanted to turn into bold.

settings.title: Remove Popup and Pop Down Animations
Remove Popup Background Blur
settings.description: This removes the background blur when opening the Settings, Command Palette, Quick Switcher, and other pop up boxes.This is a good option to toggle on if you are experiencing unreconcilable buggy-ness and visual issues with Primary. You may also toggle this on if you don't prefer the background blur, or just need some performance boost (especially for bigger vaults).

settings.title: Ribbon Border Width
settings.description: If you want to remove the border, set this to 0px.

settings.title: Ribbon Top Right Border Roundness
settings.description: The roundness value's order goes top left, top right, bottom right, bottom left.

settings.title: Ribbon Width
settings.description: Adjust your ribbon's width. Unit is in px only.

settings.title: Ribbon Icon Size
settings.description: Adjust your ribbon's icon size. Unit is in px only.

settings.title: Ribbon Icons Spacing
settings.description: Adjust the top and bottom space between your ribbon's icons.

settings.title: Editor Background Color
settings.description: Sets the size of the grid, dotted grid, or image

settings.title: Editor Background Size for Pattern Background
settings.description: Sets the size of the line grid or dot grid

settings.title: Editor Background's Pattern Color
settings.description: Only available for line grid or dot grid background types. Sets the color of the line grid, dot grid. For line grid, it will take the color input and reduce it to 30% opacity.

options.label: Hide Full File Header (Shows when Hovered)
Hide Title on File Header (Shows when Hovered)

settings.title: File Readable Line Width
settings.description: You may use any CSS units like em, rem, ch, px.

settings.title: Active Line Gutter Number Text Color
Toggle Active Line Highlighting
settings.description: Adds background color to active line.

settings.title: Active Line Background Color
settings.description: Only works when Active Line Highlighting is turned on.

settings.title: Status Bar Border Width
settings.description: Set this to 0px if you wish to remove the status bar's border. The border width value's order goes top, right, bottom, left. The default value corresponds the roundness for the On Top style. Applying 1 value means that value is applied to all sides.

settings.title: Status Bar Border Roundness
settings.description: The roundness value's order goes top left, top right, bottom right, bottom left. The default value corresponds the roundness for the On Top style. Applying 1 value means that value is applied to all corners.

settings.title: Floating Style - Status Bar Opacity at Rest
settings.description: Sets the opacity of the status bar at rest if Floating Status Bar style is chosen. Range goes from 0 being transparent, until 1 being completely visible.

settings.title: Floating Style - Status Bar Opacity on Hover
settings.description: Sets the opacity of the status bar when hovering it if Floating Status Bar style is chosen. Range goes from 0 being transparent, until 1 being completely visible.

settings.title: Progress Border Widths
settings.description: Applied to the background bar and the value bar.

settings.title: Progress Inner Value Roundness
settings.description: Takes in the progress bar's height by default, creating rounded corners. If you want straight corners put 0px.

settings.title: Progress Color 1
settings.description: Color for values 0% to 39%

settings.title: Progress Color 1
settings.description: Color for values 40% to 59%

settings.title: Progress Color 1
settings.description: Color for values 60% to 79%

settings.title: Progress Color 1
settings.description: Color for values 80% to 99%
If you want the color for progress bars valued at 100% to be a solid color, set the same color for each of the three below.

settings.title: Progress 100% Leftmost Color
settings.description: Leftmost color in the gradient for value 100%.

settings.title: Progress 100% Middle Color
settings.description: Middle color in the gradient for value 100%

settings.title: Progress 100% Rightmost Color
settings.description: Rightmost color in the gradient for value 100%
🎨 Visit the [Header Presets](https://primary-theme.github.io/guides/overview/) section in the Full Guide to import the Settings.
📖 The settings are based on CSS styling capabilities.

settings.title: Text Alignment
settings.description: You may choose from left, center, or right.

settings.title: Line Height
settings.description: Sets the spacing between multiple lines of text of the heading. You can use units such as px, em, rem as well.

settings.title: Vertically Align Header to Center
settings.description: If you add a background color, Obsidian has some spacing at the top for each header. Turning this on will ensure the heading has equal spacing for both top and bottom, aligning it correctly.

settings.title: Border Thickness
settings.description: You may also have different thickness per side in the order of top, right, bottom, right (i.e. 5px 2px 3px 4px).

settings.title: Border Style
settings.description: You may choose from solid, dashed, dotted, and double. Same with thickness, you can have different styles per side.

settings.title: Roundness
settings.description: Add rounding to your headings. Best to use with a background color. If you'd like to have different roundness for each corner, you can set one in the order of top-left, top-right, bottom-right, bottom-left (i.e. 4px 2px 6px 3px).

settings.title: Underlined Text Color
settings.description: Not natively supported in markdown, but underline can be activated with HTML.

settings.title: Underlined Text Line Opacity
settings.description: Not natively supported in markdown, but underline can be activated with HTML. If used, you can set the underline's line opacity from 0% (no line visibility) to 100% (full color visibility). The color is taken from the underline's text color.

settings.title: All Links Underline Offset
settings.description: This changes how far the underline is from the base of the link's letters.

settings.title: Link Underline Opacity
settings.description: Set from 0% (no underline visibility) to 100% (full underline color visibility). Underline color inherits the Link's color.

settings.title: Non-markdown Links
settings.description: Links that appear outside of notes

settings.title: Unresolved Link Opacity
settings.description: Choose a number between 0 to 1.

settings.title: Reading Mode – Indentation Line Guide Indent
settings.description: Might require some customization if you change fonts. Unit is in em.

settings.title: Live Preview Mode – Indentation Line Guide Indent
settings.description: Might require some customization if you change fonts. Unit is in em.

settings.title: Source Mode – Indentation Line Guide Indent
settings.description: Might require some customization if you change fonts. Unit is in em.

settings.title: Checked Text Decoration (causes Strikethrough)
settings.description: Text decoration for checked items default at "line-through". If you would like to remove the strikethrough for checked items, put "none".

settings.title: Checkbox Border Radius
settings.description: Changes the roundness of the checkbox. You may use other units such as %, em, or rem. If you want circular checkboxes, put "100%". If you want squircle checkboxes, put "5px" or "6px". If you want square checkboxes, put "2px" or "0".

settings.title: Important [!] Border Radius
settings.description: Changes the roundness of the checkbox. You may use other units such as px, em, or rem.

settings.title: Cancelled [-] Text Decoration (causes Strikethrough)
settings.description: Text decoration for items marked [-] default at "line-through". If you would like to remove the strikethrough, put "none".

settings.title: Amount [S] Border Radius
settings.description: Changes the roundness of the checkbox. You may use other units such as px, em, or rem.

settings.title: Media Border Radius
settings.description: Set border radius size for media (images, audio, video)

🎨 Visit the [Note Embed Presets](https://primary-theme.github.io/presets/note-embed) in the Full Guide and check if you have any preferred ready-to-go style presets there, or if you want some inspiration on styling your embeds.

settings.title: Note Embed Max Height
settings.description: If you embed very long notes, you can change the max height so that each embed is scrollable. You can also set this by line-height using the unit rlh, or other CSS supported units. Recommended values are 20rlh and 40rlh.

settings.title: Hide Note Embed Title
settings.description: Hide the note's title when embedding notes.

settings.title: Note Embed Title Font Size
settings.description: You can use any CSS supported units. By default takes in the editor's font size based in the Obsidian Settings.

settings.title: Note Embed Title Text Transform
settings.description: Based on CSS. If you want the note embed title to be in all uppercase, put uppercase. Other options include capitalize and lowercase.

settings.title: Note Embed Title Letter Spacing
settings.description: You can use numbers and CSS units.

settings.title: Note Embed Title Bottom Border Width
settings.description: If you'd like to remove the border, set this to 0px.

settings.title: Note Embed Title Bottom Border Style
settings.description: Other options include dashed, dotted, and double.

settings.title: Note Embed Title Bottom Margin Size
Note Embed Border Radius
settings.description: You can also have different radiuses per side. Just write them in the CSS format of top left, top right, bottom right, bottom left. i.e. 2px, 8px, 12px, 0px.

settings.title: Note Embed Top Border Width
settings.description: If you'd like to remove the border, set this to 0px.

settings.title: Note Embed Top Border Style
settings.description: Other options include dashed, dotted, and double.

settings.title: Note Embed Right Border Width
settings.description: If you'd like to remove the border, set this to 0px.

settings.title: Note Embed Right Border Style
settings.description: Other options include dashed, dotted, and double.

settings.title: Note Embed Bottom Border Width
settings.description: If you'd like to remove the border, set this to 0px.

settings.title: Note Embed Bottom Border Style
settings.description: Other options include dashed, dotted, and double.

settings.title: Note Embed Left Border Width
settings.description: If you'd like to remove the border, set this to 0px.

settings.title: Note Embed Left Border Style
settings.description: Other options include dashed, dotted, and double.

🎨 Out of the box, the toggles below affect both file explorer and bookmark folders. If you'd like them to be different colors, head down over to the **Bookmarks** section, turn on `Custom Bookmarks Folders` and set your desired colors.

settings.title: Toggle using Folders as Collapse Indicators
settings.description: Use folders as collapse indicators instead of chevrons.

settings.title: Toggle Colored Folder Text
settings.description: Adds colors to the name text of the folder. When hovered, folder background is colored.

settings.title: Toggle Colored Folder Collapse Indicators
settings.description: Adds color to the collapse indicators of the folders.

settings.title: Toggle Colored Folder Backgrounds
settings.description: Adds background color to folders.

settings.title: Toggle Colored Folder Colored Indentation Guide
settings.description: Colors folder's indentation guide based on parent folder's color.

settings.title: Toggle to Inherit Parent Folder Colors
settings.description: The color cycles through up to 12 colors for both top level folders and subfolders by default. If you would like subfolders to be colored based on their top level folder colors, toggle this on.
🔄 Folder Colors are setup to cycle through up to 12 colors. At default, it cycles through only 6 colors that I've set up to repeat. Feel free to color them as you wish.

🎨 The collapse indicator and indentation guide colors take in the color of the text color. If you don't want the hassle of changing these two other nuances, you can just change the text color.

Same goes for background color when hovered, you can focus on just changing the background color and leave the hovered color and it will adjust accordingly.

settings.title: Custom Bookmarks Folders
settings.description: By default, File Explorer and Bookmarks share the same colors when the colorful folders toggles are turned on. If you'd like a different color for the Bookmarks folders, toggle this on and set your preferred colors below. Just like File Explorer, customization goes up to 12 folders and cycles through them.

settings.title: Resolved Note Node Color
settings.description: Color of existing notes

settings.title: Unresolved Note Node Color
settings.description: Color of notes that don't exist (unresolved backlinks)

settings.title: Unresolved Note Node Opacity
settings.description: Opacity of nodes that don't exist (unresolved backlinks). Use a number that is less than or equal to 1, but more than or equal to 0.

settings.title: Use UI Accent Color for Icons
settings.description: Makes the Icons inherit the UI Accent Color.

settings.title: Feature Toggles
settings.description: Toggle / hide certain aspects of the theme.

settings.title: Fade Inactive Tabs
settings.description: Fades out inactive UI tabs to help distinguish the currently active tab.

settings.title: Disable Blurred Background Effect
settings.description: Disables the blur background in all elements that use it by making them opaque.

settings.title: Collapsed Pinned Tabs
settings.description: This option removes the title from pinned tabs and adds back the default file icon for the markdown files. Helps reduce the horizontal space wasted by pinned tabs. You can still see the title when you hover over the icon. NOTE - This option requires Installer Version 1.1.9+ due to use of CSS `has()`. Also, might not work on certain Mobile clients.

settings.title: Enable PDF Dark Theme
settings.description: This option adds styling to the PDF pages by blending in with the colour scheme in Dark mode; making it more eye friendly. This isn't a perfect solution. Note that some images might look inverted and colours be a different shade compared to the original file.

settings.title: Disable Prism Callout Styling
settings.description: This option removes the custom Callout Styling introduced with Prism and reverts to a completely default look. This should be used if you prefer the default callout styling or have CSS Snippets that use it's customisation options.

settings.title: Disable Prism Mark Highlight Styling
settings.description: This option removes the Prism Mark Highlight Styling (reverts to default look). This will be handy for those that already use a different <mark> tag based highlighting system.

settings.title: Prism Alternative Checkboxes
settings.description: Options for enabling and customising the Alternative Checkboxes feature.

settings.title: Enable Prism Alternative Checkboxes
settings.description: Disable this if you are using your own implementation via a CSS Snippet.

settings.description: Additional help and information regarding Prism.

settings.description: The higher the value, the lighter the color.

settings.description.zh: 如果为空，将使用等宽字体。

settings.description.zh: 通常在 100、400、700、900 时会有明显区别，但取决于字体。

settings.description.zh: 如果开启，折叠指示器将不会显示，点击标题层级指示器将展开或折叠标题下的内容。

settings.title: Enable Alternative Checkboxes
settings.description: Disable this if you are using your own implementation via a CSS Snippet.
settings.description.zh: 如果你在自己的 CSS 片段中实现了复选框样式，请关闭这个选项。

settings.description: Enabling this along with `Dosg Ear` will be kind of weird but if you like it, go ahead.
settings.description.zh: 同时启用这个选项和“折角”会有点奇怪……但如果你喜欢，就试试吧。

settings.description: It's kind of useless but we keeped this feature in case you like it. (It will be deprecated in the future.)
settings.description.zh: 这个功能有点没用，但万一你喜欢呢？（未来会被弃用）

settings.title: Base Color
settings.description:
This sets the base color that many other colors are derived from.
Note that the light theme defaults to a contrast of darker side panels. Those darker panels are what you are changing here. However, with the dark theme, you will be adjusting the entire theme. Try some changes to see how it looks.

settings.title: Accent Color
settings.description: In the light theme, this is the red highlight. In the dark theme, this is the yellow highlight. This can also be adjusted in the Appearance settings section, but changing it there will override this setting. You will have to reset that color for this one to work.

settings.title: Blockquote text color

settings.title: ℹ️ Information
settings.description:
The settings provided here are designed to disable or tweak some features of the theme.
This theme does **NOT** aim to be overly-customizable.

settings.title: Remove divider line below Inline title
Disable Header indicators in the gutter
settings.description: Replace the Header indicators with the vanilla arrows

settings.title: Disable centered tabs
settings.description: Align tabs back to the left

settings.title: Enable Labeled Navs
settings.description: Replace navigation buttons with icon + label style

settings.title: 🎨 Colors
settings.description: Top color picker for light theme, bottom color picker for dark theme

settings.title: Accented window frame
settings.description: Higher value reduces overall interface contrast.

settings.title: Flat Color Mode
settings.description: Make the appearance flat and less colorful. Optimal for hiding elements and increasing focus!

settings.title: Hide Folder Notes
settings.description: Disguise folder notes instead of rendering them as links (AidenLx's Folder Note Plug-In)

settings.title: Bold Folders
settings.description: Make folders more distinguishable from files.

settings.title: Link-Like Files
settings.description: Make files in the file explorer look like links.

settings.title: Pure Markdown Mode
settings.description: Remove as many WYSIWYG elements as possible in source mode.

settings.title: Paragraph Margin
settings.description: The spacing between paragraphs.

settings.title: Even Paragraphs
settings.description:
Make paragraphs evenly spaced (any
element is treated like a new line).

settings.title: Paragraph Indent
settings.description: Control the degree of indentation on a paragraph (requires Indent Paragraphs to be toggled on.)

settings.title: Font Bundle
settings.description: Choose a combination of fonts. NOTE - some fonts may not work offline.

settings.title: Show Collapse Indicators
settings.description: Always show collapse indicators for headings.

settings.title: Heading Markers in Edit Mode
settings.description: Show heading level indicators in edit mode.

settings.title: Heading Font
settings.description: The font used for all headings unless individually specified.

settings.title: Heading Weight
settings.description: The weight used for all headings unless individually specified.

settings.title: Heading Alignment
settings.description: The alignment used for all headings unless individually specified.

settings.title: Turn off Properties Hover Style
settings.description: Enable to turn off automatic hover folding and unfolding of the properties and restore the behaviour of the Default Theme

settings.title: Link Font
settings.description: Secondary font by default. You can reference other fonts with var(--font-text), var(--font-monospace), 'Noto Sans', and so on and so forth.

settings.title: Link Glow Effect in Dark Mode
Captions
settings.description: Image alts appear as captions. Alts containing a hashtag (#) will remain hidden. NOTE - This only works for internal images.

settings.title: Max Embed Height
settings.description: The height limit for an embed. When an embed reaches this limit, scrolling is required to view the rest of it.

settings.title: Speech Bubbles
settings.description: Credit - AnuPpuccin Theme by Anubis

settings.title: Simplified Backlinks
settings.description: Shimmering Focus inspired backlinks pane that shows backlinks as a simple list.

settings.title: Focus Mode Settings
settings.description: control behaviours intended to promote focus, such as inactive lines and panes fading out.

settings.title: Fade out Inactive Lines in Edit Mode
settings.description: Have the current line fully visible when writing. Everything else will be faded out.

options.label: Both Source and Live Preview modes

settings.title: Inactive Line Opacity
settings.description: control the opacity of inactive lines in edit mode (enable the setting above to see effect).

settings.title: Active Line Font Size
settings.description: Change the font size of the active line.

settings.title: Clarify Text on Hover
settings.description: When this is enabled, hovering over text while in edit mode will remove the opacity and blur effects as if the text under the cursor were the active line.

settings.title: Fade out Inactive Panes
settings.description: Only the active pane will be at full opacity

settings.title: Inactive Pane Opacity
settings.description: control the opacity of inactive panes

settings.title: Folder Focus
settings.description: (Experimental) Focus on the folder that holds the active file.

settings.title: Hidden Elements
settings.description: Hide or unhide other workspace elements until hovered over with the mouse.

settings.title: Hide Backlinks Pane in Edit Mode
Opacity Transitions Only
settings.description: Animations that would typically move elements around (like hiding the tab bar) are reduced to opacity animations only. This means only the opacity will be affected; no actual movements.

settings.title: Turn off Animations
settings.description: Turn off all animation transitions. May improve performance on E-ink or displays with low refresh rates.

settings.title: Enable Serenity Mode
settings.description: Hide EVERYTHING on screen except the note you're working on. WARNING - You will only be able to exit editing mode with the Edit/Reading mode toggle hotkey (CTRL + E).

settings.title: Font Size in Serenity Mode
settings.description: To keep the font size dynamic and unchanged, type "var(--font-text-size)"

settings.title: Pure Serenity - Light Mode
settings.description: Change the light mode colors to be a dim shade of grey in edit mode, ignoring the theme.

settings.title: Pure Serenity - Dark Mode
settings.description: Change the dark mode colors to be pure black and white in edit mode, ignoring the theme.

settings.title: Invert Edit Mode Colors in Light Mode
Invert Edit Mode Colors in Dark Mode
Standalone Inline Fields Font
settings.description: The font used for inline fields with hidden keys (fields wrapped in parentheses).

settings.title: Font Size for Standalone Inline Fields
Use accent color for folder icons
Custom Cursor Styling
settings.description: iA-Writer-esque cursor styling

settings.title: Tween Cursor Animation
settings.description: Give the blinking cursor a smooth opacity transition.

settings.title: Cursor Thickness
settings.description: Control the cursor thickness

settings.title: Clean 2Hop Links
settings.description: A more minimalistic view for 2Hop Links.

settings.title: Compact Settings
settings.description: credit - therazam (https://github.com/Bluemoondragon07/Obsidian-Serenity/issues/1)

settings.title: Theme Color
settings.description: The domiannt color of your theme. (Dark Theme only)

settings.title: Intensity
settings.description: The intensity of the main color across your interface. (Dark Theme only)

settings.description: Font used for text in the editor

settings.description: Font used for UI elements

settings.title: Monospace Font
settings.description: Font used code blocks and inline code

settings.description: Font used within callouts

settings.title: Theme info
settings.description:
- [Changelog](https://github.com/chrisgrieser/shimmering-focus/blob/main/Changelog.md)
- [README](https://github.com/chrisgrieser/shimmering-focus)
- 🔍 There is a search at the top of this settings page.

settings.title: 🙈 Show/hide UI elements
settings.description: Re-enable user interface elements hidden by this theme
The setting to remove the ribbon (the thin sidebar to the very left) has been removed, since with Obsidan 1.6 you can do so via the Obsidian settings: `Appearance → Interface → Show ribbon menu`

settings.title: Always show tab bar
settings.description: By default, this theme hides the tab bar when there is only one tab.

settings.title: Hide inline title when more than one tab
settings.description: This setting is most useful when the tab bar is hidden.

settings.title: Left sidebar: Hide the vault switcher and settings button
settings.description: You can still access the settings via `cmd/ctrl + ,`.

settings.title: Permanently show the sidebar header buttons
settings.description: By default, the buttons at the top of the sidebar panels are only visible when hovering.

settings.title: Re-enable suggester hints
settings.description: Suggesters are modals like the command palette or quick switcher. By default, this theme hides the keyboard hints at the bottom of those suggesters. Enable this to display them again.

settings.title: Re-enable new tab button
settings.description: You can still open a new tab via `ctrl/cmd+t`.

settings.title: Re-enable tab list button
settings.description: You can still switch to tabs via quick switcher, and you can toggle stacked tabs via the command palette.

settings.title: Re-enable sidebar toggle buttons
settings.description: Note that sidebar buttons of hidden sidebars are going to be inaccessible when also enable the setting to hide the tab bar. You can still toggle the sidebars via command palette or hotkey.

settings.title: Re-enable close buttons
settings.description: You can still close settings with `esc`, and tabs/panes by with `ctrl/cmd+w`.

settings.title: Show URLs of markdown links
settings.description:
By default, the URLs of markdown links are hidden in Source Mode, except for the currently active line.
ℹ️ This setting can also be toggled via command palette or hotkey.

settings.title: Status bar items
settings.description: Hide individual status bar items from plugins.

settings.title: 🔲 Workspace
settings.description: Header bar, tab width, sidebars, notifications

settings.title: Use normal header bar (tab title bar)
settings.description: By default, this theme hides most of the header bar and moves the breadcrumbs to the right. You can still toggle reading/editing mode, navigate back/forward, and rename your current file with the respective command in the command palette or a hotkey. (This setting has no effect if `Show tab title bar` in the appearance settings is disabled.)

settings.title: Tab width
settings.description: Only affects tab width when there is enough space in the tab bar. (Obsidian automatically reduces tab width when there are more open tabs than there is space for them.)

settings.title: Sidebars: Overlaying right sidebar
settings.description: The right sidebar is placed on top of the editor instead of making the editor more narrow (i.e. the behavior on mobile).

settings.title: Status bar requires sidebars
settings.description: Hide the status bar completely, when both sidebars are hidden.

settings.title: Notifications: Display at bottom right
settings.description: By default, Obsidian displays notifications at the top right. Enable this to display them at the bottom right instead.

settings.title: 🔠 Font
settings.description: Headings, code
You can change the Text, UI, and Code font in the Obsidian settings: `Appearance → Font`

settings.title: Headings: Font size
settings.description: The font size of *all* headings is multiplied by this factor.

settings.title: Headings: No alternating colors
settings.description: Do not colorize odd heading levels (h1, h3, h5).

settings.title: Headings: No level indicators in live preview
Headings: Letter spacing
settings.description: Amount of space between letters.

settings.title: 🎨 Colors & shapes
settings.description: Alternative color schemes, angular shape, colored bold/italics, highlight color

settings.title: Use your own color scheme
settings.description:
You can create your own color scheme without any CSS knowledge by using a CSS snippet. 
[See the theme docs for further information](https://github.com/chrisgrieser/shimmering-focus#create-your-own-color-scheme).

You can [suggest your color
scheme for inclusion in Shimmering Focus](https://github.com/chrisgrieser/shimmering-focus/discussions/categories/suggest-your-color-scheme-for-inclusion-in-shimmering-focus).
Especially submissions of classic, well-known color schemes are welcome.

settings.title: Alternative color schemes
settings.description: Colorschemes submitted by the community

settings.title: Background color tone (light mode)
settings.description: Only available when using the default color scheme.

settings.title: Background color tone (dark mode)
settings.description: Only available when using the default color scheme.

settings.title: Angular shapes
settings.description: Use angular instead of rounded corners throughout the app.

settings.title: Uncolored bold
settings.description: **Bold text** will use the standard text color instead of being colored.

settings.title: Uncolored italic
settings.description: *Italic text* will use the standard text color instead of being colored.

settings.title: Color tone of highlights
settings.description: Hue of ==highlighted text==

settings.title: Uncolored strikethroughs
settings.description: ~~Strikethrough text~~ will use the standard text color instead of being red.

settings.title: 📑 Editor content
settings.description: Active block highlights, dimmed panes, code blocks, line length, trailing spaces

settings.title: Dimmed inactive panes
settings.description: Opacity of inactive panes. Set to 100% to disable dimming.

settings.title: Line length
settings.description: The length of the editor content when Obsidian's `Readable line length` setting is enabled. The theme also adds a command `Toggle readable line length`.

settings.title: Hide trailing spaces
settings.description: By default, this theme indicates the presence of trailing spaces when there are more than one with "··↵". This can be useful for the "two space rule" in markdown, where exactly two spaces at the end of a line enforce a line break.

settings.title: 🖼️ Media
settings.description: Images & tables

settings.title: Images: No alt-text as caption
settings.description: By default, the theme adds the alt-text/filename of an image as caption.

settings.title: Images: Size (percent)
settings.description: The theme also adds a command `Toggle between reduced and full image size` which toggles between 100% image size and the reduced image size below. In addition, clicking & holding images will also enlarge an image.

settings.title: between reduced and full image size
Automatically disable `readable line length` on notes with tables
🏃 Vim mode
settings.description: Cursor, blinking, cursorline, relative line numbers, disable mouse hovers & tooltips

settings.title: Cursor blink rate
settings.description: Only affects normal mode. Set to 0 to disable blinking altogether.

settings.title: Relative line numbers
settings.description: `Line numbers` must also be enabled in the Obsidian settings.

settings.title: Cursorline
settings.description: Only works in normal mode. As opposed to the "active line indicator", this works on visual lines instead of logical lines. This setting is independent of the "active block indicator" setting, so both can be used at the same time.

settings.title: Disable tooltips & "Edit this block" button
settings.description: Disables tooltips and buttons displayed when hovering various elements in Live Preview.

settings.title: ✍️ Longform & writing
settings.description: Settings for notes in longform projects and notes with the writing cssclass.

settings.title: Main font
settings.description: Font used in longform/writing notes. (Except code, which still use the monospace font.)

settings.title: Status bar: Show word count only when longform/writing note is open
settings.description: Works for the Word Count core plugin and the Better Word Count community plugin.

settings.title: Status bar: Hide longform wordcount
settings.description: This affects the word count from the longform plugin, not the other word count plugins.

settings.title: Tasks: Use gray instead of normal text color
settings.description: This can help with differentiating tasks from "finished" text.

settings.title: Left-aligned text
settings.description: Use left-aligned text instead of justified text.

settings.title: First-line indent & no spacing between paragraphs (reading mode)
settings.description: Indent the first line of a paragraph and remove the spacing between paragraphs.

settings.title: ⚙️ Plugin-specific settings
settings.description: File explorer, bookmarks, backlinks, outgoing links, outline, bases

settings.title: File explorer: Hide attachments folders
settings.description: Affects folders exactly named "attachments" (case-insensitive).

settings.title: File explorer: Show buttons
settings.description: The buttons for new file, new folder, and sorting. You can do the former two without the buttons by right-clicking a folder.

settings.title: Bookmarks: Show buttons in sidebar
settings.description: By default, the Bookmark plugin buttons for new bookmarks, new folders, and collapsing are hidden. Enable this setting to show them again.

settings.title: Bookmarks: Show icons in sidebar
settings.description: By default, the icons indicating bookmark types are hidden. Enable this setting to show them again.

settings.title: Normal outgoing links and backlinks
settings.description: By default, the sidebar for outgoing links and backlinks are reduced to linked mentions only. Enable this setting to restore their original display.

settings.title: Use normal inline backlinks
settings.description: By default, the inline-backlinks are displayed in a more minimalistic manner. Enable this setting to restore original display of backlinks. This also affects the Influx plugin.

settings.title: Outline: Show buttons in sidebar
settings.description: By default, the outline plugin buttons for collapsing, expanding, and searching headings are hidden. Enable this setting to show a compact version of them.

settings.title: Various complements: Show completion source icon
